title: §13 RiskDiscipline gap: sleeve net-directional/single-instrument concentration computed but NOT enforced or monitored
source: risk-officer freeze-readiness review 2026-06-16 (docs/reviews/2026-06-16-risk-officer-freeze-readiness-vs-authoritative-rules.md), PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT vs authoritative §13/§14 rules.
why: §14 (forced-liq=elimination) is SAFE with huge margin (worst-case 1.0xE -> ~3.3% margin usage; no rung approaches a margin call; latch bounds capital-at-risk). BUT §13 RiskDiscipline (5% of composite, -10 for single-instrument >90% OR net-directional >95% sustained >=30 min) has a real gap: discipline_scale (execution/discipline_guard.py:155-244) COMPUTES all four metrics but only throttles on gross-leverage and margin -- a 100%-concentrated, 100%-net-directional book returns scale=1.0/throttled=False because leverage is tiny. During a book DD-latch (book flat) the crypto-only lottery sleeve with 2-3 aligned PCE legs becomes ~100% net-directional for hours -> trips the §13 -10 in exactly the sleeve's intended scenario. Compounded by: (b) watchdog.evaluate_rules (execution/watchdog.py:91-290) never reads the single_instrument_share/net_directional_share it persists -> the one §13 metric we can breach is UNMONITORED post-freeze; (c) lottery orders bypass the discipline guard entirely (live_loop.py:1317 runs _apply_discipline_guard only on rebalance orders; sleeve opens/adds at :567-641 are placed directly).
value_rationale: §13 is only 5% of the composite and resets per round (NOT elimination), but it triggers in exactly the Stage-2 sleeve scenario we intend to run, and is currently invisible. Cheap to monitor; the enforcement-vs-accept call is load-bearing for the sleeve's design (enforcing concentration caps would neuter the sleeve's deliberate net-directional variance bet).
scope: CEO DECISION (load-bearing): enforce §13 net-directional/single-instrument caps on the crypto-only sleeve (NEUTERS the deliberate variance bet) OR record explicit CEO acceptance of the -10 §13 ding for Stage-2 (the sleeve IS a directional crypto bet by design).

SAFE must-fix (non-conflicting, alert-only): add a watchdog rule on single_instrument_share/net_directional_share with >=30-min sustained semantics (at least alert-only) so the one breachable §13 metric is monitored post-freeze. TDD.
Decide whether sleeve opens/adds should route through _apply_discipline_guard (gross/margin headroom only, NOT the concentration cap, to preserve the bet) for consistency.
recommendation: Do the SAFE alert-only watchdog rule now (observability, does not alter risk behavior or neuter the sleeve). Surface the enforce-vs-accept §13 decision to the CEO -- recommend ACCEPT the -10 ding (the sleeve is a deliberate, envelope-bounded directional bet; -10 on a 5%-weight per-round-reset term ~= 0.5% of composite is a fair price for the variance, and §14 is unaffected). Hard-gate any change to discipline_scale enforcement behind the existing risk-altering validation gate.
out_of_scope: Any change that weakens §14 protection. Re-sizing the lottery rungs (B0182, CEO-reserved).

history.reason: Spawned from the risk-officer freeze-readiness review (PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT): §13 concentration/net-directional computed but not enforced/monitored; §14 safe.

SAFE alert-only watchdog rule DISCIPLINE_CONCENTRATION (execution/watchdog.py) on single_instrument_share>0.90 OR net_directional_share>0.95 sustained >=30min; surfaced shares + discipline_breach_since into read_snapshot risk{}; TDD, 11 new tests, 173-test execution slice green; NO change to discipline_scale enforcement / trading behavior.

CEO decision 2026-06-16: ACCEPT the -10 §13 RiskDiscipline ding for the Stage-2 crypto sleeve (it is a deliberate, envelope-bounded net-directional bet; -10 on a 5%-weight per-round-reset term ~= 0.5% of composite, §14 unaffected). Do NOT enforce concentration caps on the sleeve (would neuter the variance bet). PROCEED with the SAFE alert-only watchdog monitoring so breaches are visible during the Jun-17 rehearsal + live. Scope item 1 = RESOLVED (accept); scope item 2 (alert-only watchdog) dispatched to execution-engineer.
CEO accepted the ding; alert-only watchdog monitoring slice dispatched (TDD).
live-loop discipline_breach_since wiring complete; rule now fires end-to-end

Production persistence path VERIFIED by PM: scripts/run_survival_live._write_snapshot (line 683) already persists full res.diagnostics (incl diagnostics.discipline_guard.post -> single_instrument_share/net_directional_share) to last_cycle.json; the new live_loop wiring persists discipline_breach_since to risk_state.json; webapp/state_reader.read_snapshot surfaces both; watchdog DISCIPLINE_CONCENTRATION rule consumes both. Alert-only §13 monitoring is now LIVE end-to-end (502 execution tests green, no trading-behavior change). Scope item 1 (accept-vs-enforce)=CEO ACCEPT; item 2 (monitoring)=DONE; item 3 (route lottery through guard)=moot under accept+monitor (would risk enforcing the cap we chose to accept).
§13 alert-only monitoring delivered + verified end-to-end; CEO accepted the ding; §14 elimination risk confirmed safe.
CEO ACCEPTED the sec13 recommendation 2026-06-17: ACCEPT the -10 RiskDiscipline ding on the sleeve (5% weight, per-round reset term); do not enforce-away. SAFE watchdog already built.
